title: The Missing Honeycomb Mystery
synopsis: Nia helps solve the mystery of the missing honeycomb by following clues and discovering that a hungry bear cub was the culprit. Through kindness and understanding, she helps the animals work together to share food.

pages.text: Nia loved exploring the savanna near her home. She had long braids with colorful beads that jingled as she walked. Today, she heard buzzing sounds coming from the old baobab tree.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking through golden grass toward a massive baobab tree. Bees buzz around the tree in thick brushstrokes. The scene is painted in gouache with warm savanna colors and bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Nia walking toward a large baobab tree with bees buzzing around it

pages.text: The bees looked very upset. Buzzy, the queen bee, flew to Nia. 'Our honeycomb is gone!' she cried. 'Someone took it from our hive last night!'

illustration.description: A close-up gouache painting of upset bees surrounding a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes. The queen bee hovers near Nia's face. Thick brushstrokes show the bees' distress with textured painterly technique in warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Buzzy the queen bee talking to Nia while other bees look upset

pages.text: Nia looked up at the empty hive. 'Don't worry, Buzzy. I'll help you find your honeycomb. Let's look for clues!' She examined the tree trunk carefully.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes examining claw marks on a baobab tree trunk. The gouache painting shows golden grass below and orange sunset colors in the background with bold confident strokes and expressive detail.
illustration.alt: Nia examining claw marks on the baobab tree trunk

pages.text: 'Look!' Nia pointed to deep scratches on the bark. 'These are claw marks. And see these big pawprints in the dirt? Something big climbed this tree.'

illustration.description: A detailed gouache painting showing a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes crouching next to large pawprints in the golden grass. The thick brushstrokes emphasize the deep prints with textured painterly technique in warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Nia crouching next to large pawprints in the dirt

pages.text: Nia followed the pawprints across the savanna. They led to a stream where Kesi the elephant was drinking water. 'Did you see anyone near the bee tree last night?' Nia asked.

illustration.description: A gouache painting of a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes talking to a large elephant by a stream. The scene uses thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors with golden grass and expressive animals painted in bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Nia talking to Kesi the elephant by a stream

pages.text: Kesi lifted her trunk thoughtfully. 'I heard loud snuffling sounds around midnight. It came from the direction of the rocky hills.' She pointed with her trunk.

illustration.description: An expressive elephant with her trunk raised pointing toward rocky hills in the distance. A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes stands beside her. The gouache painting shows orange sunset colors and textured painterly brushwork.
illustration.alt: Kesi the elephant pointing her trunk toward rocky hills

pages.text: The pawprints continued toward the hills. On the way, Nia met Jengo the monkey swinging from an acacia tree. 'I saw something big and furry near the caves!' he chattered.

illustration.description: A gouache painting of an expressive monkey hanging from an acacia tree talking to a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes below. The scene uses thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors with golden grass and bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Jengo the monkey hanging from a tree talking to Nia

pages.text: 'It had small round ears and a stubby tail,' Jengo added. 'It was carrying something sticky and golden!' Now Nia was getting closer to solving the mystery.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking thoughtful with her hand on her chin. The gouache painting shows golden grass around her with textured painterly technique and warm savanna colors in thick brushstrokes.
illustration.alt: Nia thinking carefully about the clues she has gathered

pages.text: Nia climbed up the rocky hill to the caves. She heard soft crying sounds coming from inside. Following the sounds, she found a small bear cub sitting alone.

illustration.description: A gouache painting of a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes approaching a small, sad bear cub in a rocky cave. The scene uses thick brushstrokes and warm colors with textured painterly technique and expressive animals.
illustration.alt: Nia finding a crying bear cub in a rocky cave

pages.text: The cub had sticky honey on his paws and face. Next to him was the missing honeycomb! 'I'm sorry,' sniffled the cub. 'I was so hungry, and it smelled so good.'

illustration.description: A close-up gouache painting showing a bear cub with honey on his paws and the golden honeycomb nearby. A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes kneels beside him with a kind expression. Bold confident strokes show the textured honey.
illustration.alt: The bear cub with honey on his paws next to the stolen honeycomb

pages.text: 'My name is Biko,' said the cub. 'I got separated from my mama during the big storm. I don't know how to find food by myself.' Nia's heart felt sad for the lonely cub.

illustration.description: A gouache painting of a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting next to a small bear cub. The orange sunset colors filter into the cave, painted with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors showing compassion between them.
illustration.alt: Nia sitting compassionately next to Biko the bear cub

pages.text: 'Don't worry, Biko. Let's return the honeycomb to the bees and ask them to help.' Nia led Biko back to the baobab tree where Buzzy and the other bees were waiting.

illustration.description: A gouache painting showing a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking with a small bear cub carrying the honeycomb back toward the baobab tree. Golden grass surrounds them with thick brushstrokes and textured painterly technique.
illustration.alt: Nia and Biko carrying the honeycomb back to the baobab tree

pages.text: Biko gave back the honeycomb and said sorry. Buzzy was kind. 'We can share some honey if you promise to ask first next time.' All the animals helped Biko learn to find food safely.

illustration.description: A gouache painting showing a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes surrounded by the bear cub, bees, elephant, and monkey all together by the baobab tree. The scene shows friendship and cooperation with warm savanna colors and bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: All the animals gathered together, showing friendship and cooperation

pages.text: Nia smiled as she watched her new friends work together. The mystery was solved, and everyone was happy. Sometimes the best solution is understanding and kindness.

illustration.description: A final gouache painting of a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking home through golden grass with an orange sunset behind her. The textured painterly style shows contentment and peace with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Nia walking home happily through the golden savanna at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What was missing from the bee hive?
questions.explanation: The bees told Nia that their honeycomb was stolen from the hive during the night.

questions.question: What clues did Nia find at the baobab tree?
questions.explanation: Nia found deep scratches on the bark and big pawprints in the dirt that showed something big had climbed the tree.

questions.question: Who took the honeycomb?
questions.explanation: Biko the bear cub had taken the honeycomb because he was hungry and separated from his mother.

questions.question: Where did Nia find the missing honeycomb?
choices: in a cave in the rocky hills
questions.explanation: Nia followed the clues and found Biko and the honeycomb in a cave in the rocky hills.

questions.question: How did the story end?
choices: everyone worked together to help Biko
questions.explanation: The bees forgave Biko, and all the animals worked together to help him learn how to find food safely.
